selections.name: Rock Hard Rose
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop into a $15k claimer today. Her recent speed figures in tougher company make her a standout on the Tapeta.

selections.name: Genius Of Love
selections.reason: Consistent runner who consistently posts figures in the 60-76 range. Fits perfectly at this level and should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Prima
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and figures to be involved early. The inside draw should allow her to save ground.

selections.name: Holiday With Amy
selections.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day. The rail draw is beneficial for her tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Shootin' Amy
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up at a price if the pace collapses.

selections.name: British Artillery
selections.reason: Boasts strong recent turf figures (86, 90) and has the late kick required to succeed on this sweeping turf course.

selections.name: King Rosso
selections.reason: Very consistent turf performer with figures consistently in the mid-80s. Should be perfectly positioned mid-pack.

selections.name: Motion Granted
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with solid turf efforts. The temporary rail at 22 ft might aid his closing style.

selections.name: Countryboysurvive
selections.reason: Capable of a big run on his best day, posting a 90 figure two starts back. Dangerous if he replicates that effort.

danger_horse.name: Bankingonamiracle
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and could get brave if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Bandolier
selections.reason: Showed good early speed in debut, posting a 61 figure. Natural progression second time out makes her the one to beat.

selections.name: March
selections.reason: First-time starter for the potent Mark Casse barn with Rafael Hernandez aboard. Must be respected on debut.

selections.name: Classic Lines
selections.reason: Well-bred first-time starter drawing the rail. Trainer Gail Cox can have them ready to fire early.

selections.name: Bitter Bullet
selections.reason: Another intriguing first-time starter from the Sid Attard barn. Watch the tote board for clues.

danger_horse.name: Mo Cookie
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is favorable for a debut runner to stay out of trouble.

selections.name: Mighty Tanner
selections.reason: Has posted the best recent figures in this field (67, 63). The cutback in distance should suit her perfectly.

selections.name: That's A Fact
selections.reason: Consistent runner who figures to get a great stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Lemon Sweets
selections.reason: Posted a strong 73 figure two starts back. If she bounces back to that effort, she is a major player.

selections.name: Beau Pink
selections.reason: Has shown enough early foot to be involved and could hang on for a share of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Lady Dayrells
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could allow her to save ground and sneak into the superfecta at a price.

selections.name: Grandson
selections.reason: Taking a massive class drop from AOC company. His back figures (89, 86, 98) absolutely tower over this field.

selections.name: One More Brew
selections.reason: Consistent mid-80s figure earner who should get a perfect ground-saving trip from post 2.

selections.name: C My Meister
selections.reason: Has been running solid races with figures in the mid-to-high 80s. A logical contender for the underneath spots.

selections.name: Ninja Star
selections.reason: Capable of a big run on his best day, posting a 90 figure three starts back. Dangerous if he finds his best stride.

danger_horse.name: Proud Ronin
danger_horse.reason: Could control the pace from the inside draw if left uncontested.

races.exotic_strategy: BEST BET: Win Bet #5. Exacta 5 / 2,4, Trifecta 5 / 2,3,4 / 1,2,3,4

selections.name: Cayenne Kiss
selections.reason: Posted a strong 74 figure in her last start. A repeat of that effort makes her very tough to beat at this level.

selections.name: Citori
selections.reason: Has back figures that fit well here (71, 78). Should get a good setup sitting just off the early speed.

selections.name: Suigu Belle
selections.reason: Showed improvement two starts back. The rail draw should help her save ground and be a factor late.

selections.name: Worry Less
selections.reason: Has posted figures in the high 70s in the past. Capable of hitting the board if she brings her A-game.

danger_horse.name: Gretna Green
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw keeps her out of trouble; could pick up the pieces if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Majaz (gb)
selections.reason: European shipper who has finished second in her last two starts overseas. Classy pedigree and fits this sweeping turf course perfectly.

selections.name: Dyna
selections.reason: Has posted solid figures (80, 73) and looks ready to break through in this maiden event.

selections.name: Onehotmess
selections.reason: Improving with every start, posting an 84 figure last time out. A major threat with continued progression.

selections.name: Scotch Mist
selections.reason: Has run well in the past with an 88 figure two starts back. Will be flying late.

danger_horse.name: Lapin De Plage
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Just Magnificent
selections.reason: Has been running against tougher company and posting solid figures (78, 86). The outside draw is ideal for her stalking style.

selections.name: Bold Ripasso
selections.reason: Consistent runner with figures in the low-to-mid 70s. Should be right in the mix turning for home.

selections.name: Hymn To Her
selections.reason: Has tactical speed and should get a good trip sitting just off the pace.

selections.name: Lorraine's Beauty
selections.reason: Capable of a better effort than her last start. Back figures suggest she belongs with this group.

danger_horse.name: Velocita
danger_horse.reason: Could get a favorable pace setup if the front-runners duel early.

selections.name: Thank You India
selections.reason: Very consistent runner posting figures in the high 70s. Draws well and should get a perfect trip.

selections.name: Empty Handed
selections.reason: Won on debut with a strong 77 figure. Has immense upside and could easily repeat against winners.

selections.name: Orion Beach
selections.reason: Has back figures (83, 80) that make her a major player. The outside draw keeps her out of trouble.

selections.name: Slippers
selections.reason: Posted a 74 figure three starts back. Dangerous if she can rediscover that form.

danger_horse.name: Lady Virago
danger_horse.reason: Carrying an extra pound today but has the tactical speed to be a nuisance early.

selections.name: English Actor
selections.reason: Boasts massive turf figures (100, 93, 98) and is a proven commodity at this level. The one to beat.

selections.name: Cairo Caper
selections.reason: Has hit the 100-figure mark in the past. A major threat with his late closing kick on this turf course.

selections.name: Wicked Django
selections.reason: Classy runner who posted a 109 figure two starts back. Cannot be ignored despite the inside draw.

selections.name: Sedburys Ghost
selections.reason: Consistent performer with figures in the 90s. Will save ground on the rail and make a late run.

danger_horse.name: Pierre
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and could get brave if the pace is slow.

selections.name: Cool Times
selections.reason: Posted a massive 89 figure in her debut. Natural progression makes her a standout in this maiden field.

selections.name: Pepper Patch
selections.reason: Has shown ability with figures of 85 and 82. Should get a great stalking trip from post 4.

selections.name: Just In Touch
selections.reason: Consistent runner with figures hovering around 80. A logical inclusion in all exotic wagers.

selections.name: Winning Agenda
selections.reason: Has figures in the mid-70s and the rail draw should allow her to save ground throughout.

danger_horse.name: Tracy Arm
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is tough, but she has the pedigree to handle the distance.
